articles.title: UPSC Prelims Result 2026 PDF Download: 13,343 candidates qualify for Civil Services Mains, check roll number list and next steps
articles.summary: UPSC has released the Civil Services Prelims 2026 result in PDF format, allowing candidates to download the roll number list and check their qualification status for the Mains examination. A total of 13,343 candidates have cleared the Preliminary stage against 1,016 vacancies.

articles.title: UPSC Prelims Result 2026: Five mistakes qualified candidates should avoid before Mains
articles.summary: With the UPSC Prelims 2026 results declared, qualified candidates must avoid common mistakes that could affect their chances in the next stage. From missing the mandatory June 19–28 application window to delaying Mains preparation, neglecting answer-writing practice and overlooking optional subjects, experts warn that small errors can have significant consequences.
